rationale.R1.2: The vague delegation to 'check this' artifact implies verifying the logical consistency of the argument chain from reported results to overall conclusions.
rationale.R1.3: Checking the artifact centrally involves assessing whether the specific performance metrics align with the broad claims of improvements and superiority.
rationale.RX.1: The artifact discusses uncertainty-aware methods, so checking should include whether uncertainties or limitations in the results are properly disclosed.
rationale.RX.2: Load-bearing aspect is to identify potential overclaims, as the text asserts consistent improvements despite some neutral or negative results.
rationale.RX.3: Important to ensure the claims of broad applicability adhere to the actual scope of the evaluated benchmarks without extrapolation.
rationale.RX.4: Given the focus on safety-critical control, checking for statements that could lead to downstream harms in deployment is relevant.
rationale.RX.5: Peripheral responsibility to verify the traceability of the reported experimental results and benchmarks to their sources.
